passedAssertions.evidence: Frontend high-signal scenario mapping present at tests/artifacts/milestone-a-frontend-high-signal-scenarios.json with explicit runtime stream handling, unknown-event warnings/no-update behavior, and provider-order invariants mapped to app/lib/services/stream-processor.test.ts and app/lib/hooks/use-models-stream-state.test.ts. Deterministic run check passed: bun run test --run => 11 files, 196 tests passed.

Backend high-signal scenario mapping present at tests/artifacts/milestone-a-backend-high-signal-scenarios.json covering run-control/approval/cancel, delegation envelopes, persistence ordering/content, and trust boundaries mapped to pytest files including tests/test_stream_run_control_commands.py and tests/test_chat_graph_runner_runtime.py. Deterministic run check passed: uv run pytest -q => 341 passed, 43 skipped.

Milestone-A command matrix in tests/artifacts/milestone-a-baseline.snapshot.json explicitly marks acceptanceCommands as bun run test --run and uv run pytest -q -rs --durations=10, and nonBlockingCommands includes npx playwright test with reason Milestone-A is unit/integration only. Mission AGENTS testing guidance is consistent with this contract.

Repeatability demonstrated by local deterministic reruns and artifact: bun run test --run executed 3 consecutive times with identical totals (11 files, 196 tests, 0 failed, 0 skipped), and uv run pytest -q executed 3 consecutive times with identical totals (341 passed, 43 skipped, 0 failed). Artifact tests/artifacts/milestone-a-run-stability.json also records stableTotals=true and intermittentFailuresObserved=false.

Assertion clarity verified in tests and scenario artifacts: stream-processor negative-path checks assert exact warning payloads and event forwarding (e.g., Unknown runtime event messages in app/lib/services/stream-processor.test.ts), and backend cancel-flow negative path explicitly asserts cancelled false/no early-cancel pollution in tests/test_stream_run_control_commands.py. Both frontend and backend high-signal scenario artifacts include diagnosticSignal fields describing actionable failure semantics.

frictions.description: Evidence required for this group is split across mission handoffs, scrutiny reviews, and tests/artifacts; validation required cross-referencing multiple sources before command reruns.
For VAL-TEST-009, actionable-failure confidence was inferred from explicit assertion text and diagnosticSignal artifacts rather than a dedicated stored failing-run transcript in milestone artifacts.

notes: Validated only assigned assertions (VAL-TEST-005..009) via CLI contract validation and read-only artifact/test evidence. No production/business logic was modified. Assigned account/namespace were respected; namespace was not needed because no temp data creation was required.
